explanation_en: 'debug' is not an allowed ASN.1 verbosity level (expected: none|info|annoying). This causes configuration parsing to reject the setting early.
explanation_zh: 'debug' 並非允許的 ASN.1 詳細等級（預期：none|info|annoying），將在載入設定時被拒絕。

explanation_en: TAC=0 is reserved and invalid, leading to RRC/NG setup rejection for the serving cell.
explanation_zh: TAC=0 為保留值且無效，將導致服務小區在 RRC/NG 設定時被拒絕。

explanation_en: MCC must be a numeric value; using a non-numeric string breaks PLMN encoding and registration.
explanation_zh: MCC 必須為數值，使用非數字字串會破壞 PLMN 編碼並使註冊失敗。

explanation_en: MNC length must be 2 or 3; 5 is invalid and causes PLMN parsing failure.
explanation_zh: MNC 長度只能為 2 或 3；5 無效，將導致 PLMN 解析失敗。

explanation_en: S-NSSAI SD must be a hex string with 0x prefix; missing prefix causes SD decoding error.
explanation_zh: S-NSSAI 的 SD 需為帶 0x 前綴的十六進位字串；缺少前綴會導致解碼錯誤。

explanation_en: NR Cell ID must be non-negative; negative value violates RRC cell identity constraints.
explanation_zh: NR 小區識別碼必須為非負；負值違反 RRC 小區識別規範。

explanation_en: Antenna port count cannot be zero; scheduler initialization will fail for PDSCH mapping.
explanation_zh: 天線埠數不可為 0；排程器於 PDSCH 映射初始化將失敗。

explanation_en: PUSCH antenna ports must be integer; string breaks PHY configuration validation.
explanation_zh: PUSCH 天線埠需為整數；字串會使實體層設定驗證失敗。

explanation_en: Subcarrier spacing must be 0|1|2|3; 5 is invalid and causes DL numerology mismatch.
explanation_zh: 子載波間距只允許 0|1|2|3；5 無效，造成下行數學架構不匹配。

explanation_en: Carrier bandwidth cannot be zero; renders DL BWP invalid and scheduler nonfunctional.
explanation_zh: 載波頻寬不可為 0；將使下行 BWP 無效，排程器無法運作。

explanation_en: Initial DL BWP location/bandwidth expects integer encoding; malformed text breaks parser.
explanation_zh: 初始 DL BWP 位置與頻寬需整數編碼；文本格式錯誤導致解析失敗。

explanation_en: PRACH configuration index out of spec causes RA preamble scheduling failure.
explanation_zh: PRACH 組態索引超出規範，導致隨機接入前導之排程失敗。

explanation_en: PreambleTransMax valid set is limited; 11 is not allowed and RA loop will misbehave.
explanation_zh: PreambleTransMax 僅允許特定集合；11 不被允許，將導致 RA 流程異常。

explanation_en: Enumeration outside 1..8 breaks PR calculation for PRACH mapping.
explanation_zh: 枚舉值超出 1..8，導致 PRACH 對應的 PR 計算失效。

explanation_en: RSRP threshold cannot be negative; SSB selection logic will reject config.
explanation_zh: RSRP 閾值不可為負；SSB 選擇邏輯將拒絕此設定。

explanation_en: PUCCH group hopping only allows 0/1/2; 3 causes uplink control mapping error.
explanation_zh: PUCCH 群組跳頻僅允許 0/1/2；值為 3 將導致上行控制映射錯誤。

explanation_en: PUCCH hoppingId beyond permitted range breaks sequence generation.
explanation_zh: PUCCH hoppingId 超出許可範圍，會使序列產生失敗。

explanation_en: SSB periodicity enum must be 0..7; 9 is invalid and TDD patterning fails.
explanation_zh: SSB 週期枚舉必須為 0..7；9 無效並導致 TDD 佈局錯誤。

explanation_en: Common SCS must be 0..3; value 4 breaks UE compatibility and BWP setup.
explanation_zh: 通用 SCS 必須為 0..3；設為 4 會破壞 UE 相容性及 BWP 設定。

explanation_en: Number of DL slots exceeds period configuration; TDD grid becomes invalid.
explanation_zh: 下行時槽數超出週期配置，導致 TDD 網格無效。

explanation_en: SCTP in-streams must be positive; negative value breaks F1AP association setup.
explanation_zh: SCTP 輸入串流必須為正值；負值將導致 F1AP 連線建立失敗。

explanation_en: UDP port exceeds 65535; GTP-U plane cannot bind the socket.
explanation_zh: UDP 連接埠不可超過 65535；GTP-U 平面無法綁定。

explanation_en: IP address format is invalid; network stack will reject the binding address.
explanation_zh: IP 位址格式無效；網路堆疊將拒絕此綁定位址。

explanation_en: NR band 999 is undefined; RF chain cannot map to a valid frequency range.
explanation_zh: NR 頻段 999 未定義；無法對應至有效的射頻頻段。

explanation_en: MTU too small for eCPRI payloads; fronthaul segmentation fails and link drops.
explanation_zh: MTU 過小不符 eCPRI 載荷需求；前傳分片失敗並導致鏈路中斷。
